title: Add M3 day night and weather basics
summary: Add deterministic day/night and basic weather owner state for ordinary-life context.
acceptance: Day and hour derive only from simulation Tick and documented constants
Weather basics use named seeded random streams and stable scheduling without real time or visual-only randomness
Environment context can affect schedules needs mood context and work explanations through owner state and derived read models
Weather and day/night projections are read-only and do not create UI authority
Focused tests cover deterministic replay for same seed command stream and structured reason exposure

history.details: Created by WM-0045 M3 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

objective: Create deterministic ordinary-life time and weather context without adding product-level M4 weather or visual systems.
forbiddenPaths: M4 anomaly weather crisis or director systems
benchmarkImpact: Records scheduled environment update cost projection size and random stream counts; baseline updates wait for WM-0059.
reviewRouting: Simulation-engineer completes to reviewer; systems-architect reviews any time constant random stream or save boundary drift.
rollbackModel: Revert environment owner-state code tests docs and report while preserving M2 deterministic time behavior.
ownerGate: Do not change TICKS_PER_SECOND or TICKS_PER_DAY without a separate ADR
Use named seeded streams and stable ordering
Keep visual weather presentation out of this task
Block on public protocol save schema dependency or M4 scope

sparkEligibility.reason: Deterministic time and random-stream simulation design is outside Spark scope.
